---
title: "ANPP Data Merging"
author: "Kathy Condon"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(knitr)
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(car)
library(emmeans)
library(multcomp)
library(lmerTest)
library(lme4)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(rstatix)
library(tidyr)
library(ggpubr)
library(lubridate)
library(ggtext)
library(ggh4x)
library(ggpattern)
library(data.table)
library(MuMIn)
library(scales)
library(performance)

```

## Set file directories - local
```{r}
dir.create(file.path("deluge"), showWarnings = F)
dir.create(file.path("deluge","data"), showWarnings = F)
dir.create(file.path("deluge","data","R_exports"))
dir.create(file.path("deluge","figures"))
```

# Copy in productivity data from Google Drive
```{r}
#### pull data from Google Drive to local files - one at a time...select 2 to re-link drive as needed ####

## list all productivity files in drive by name
prod.files<-c("Linabury_ChANGE_ANPP.csv","CCE_ANPP_2025_R.csv","Condon_SLs_ANPP_byfunctionalgroup.csv","Hajek2024_ANPP.csv","Tooley_DRE_ANPP.csv","Post2020_ANPP.csv","Post2020_BNPP.csv","Post2021_ANPP.csv","Post2021_BNPP.csv","Hoover2022_CPER-DEX_Productivity.csv")

## read in drive folder
drive.files<-googledrive::drive_ls(googledrive::as_id("https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1-z0EMfF8_LTWr3HZVajzcO3K9jKgYM9p"))
  
## read in each file
for (i in prod.files){
  
file.name<-drive.files %>% 
  dplyr::filter(name == i) 

# if-else, to throw error if file name is incorrect or error would otherwise stop loop
if(nrow(file.name) == 1){
  googledrive::drive_download(file = file.name$id, 
                              overwrite = T,
                              path = file.path("deluge", 'data', i))
  
} else{
  message("File error - check name or if duplicated: ", i)
  }
}

```

# Reformat data to all match
- Format to site_id, var, treatment, date, year, doy, value at the plot

```{r Linabury_ChANGE}
# lin_CHANGE<-read.csv("deluge/data/Linabury_ChANGE_ANPP.csv")
# str(lin_CHANGE)
# 
# lin_CHANGE<-lin_CHANGE%>%
#   rename(total_anpp=anpp)%>%
#   pivot_longer(cols=c(grass_anpp,forb_anpp,total_anpp),names_to="funct_group")
# 
# 
# head(lin_CHANGE)

```

```{r Siggers_CCE}
CCE<-read.csv("deluge/data/CCE_ANPP_2025_R.csv")
head(CCE,5)

siggers_CCE<-CCE%>%
  rename(trt=Treatment,
         year=Year)%>%
  mutate(Study_shorthand="CCE",
         # convert g to g/m2
         C3_grass=C3_g*10,
         C4_grass=C4_g*10,
         Forb=Forb_g*10,
         ANPP=Total_g_m)%>%
  select(Study_shorthand,Plot,Replicate,trt,year,C3_grass,C4_grass,Forb,ANPP)%>%
  group_by(Study_shorthand,Plot,trt,year)%>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n.reps=n(),
    C3=mean(C3_grass),
    C4=mean(C4_grass),
    FORB=mean(Forb),
    ANPP=mean(ANPP))

CCE_long<-siggers_CCE%>%
  pivot_longer(cols=C3:ANPP,names_to="funct_group",values_to="ANPP")

head(CCE_long)
```

```{r Condon_SLs}
#### double check this is correct version of data!!! ####
SLs<-read.csv("deluge/data/Condon_SLs_ANPP_byfunctionalgroup.csv")
head(SLs,5)

condon_SLs<-SLs%>%
  rename(trt=new.TRT)%>%
  mutate(Study_shorthand="Condon_SL",
         year=case_when(
           Clip_Type == "clip" ~ "July 2021",
           Clip_Type == "reclip" ~ "July-Sept Regrowth 2021",
           Clip_Type == "clip2" ~ "Sept 2021"
         ),
         ANPP=rowSums(across(C3:WOODY),na.rm=TRUE),
         C3=C3*10,
         C4=C4*10,
         FORB=FORB*10,
         ANNUALS=ANNUALS*10,
         WOODY=WOODY*10,
         ANPP=ANPP*10)%>%
  select(Study_shorthand,Plot,trt,year,C3,C4,FORB,ANNUALS,WOODY,ANPP)

head(condon_SLs,5)

condon_SL_long<-condon_SLs%>%
  pivot_longer(cols=c(C3,C4,FORB,ANNUALS,WOODY,ANPP),names_to="funct_group",values_to="ANPP")

ANPP.avs<-condon_SL_long%>%
  filter(funct_group=="ANPP")%>%
  group_by(year,trt)%>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n.plots=n(),
    av=mean(ANPP),
    SE=sd(ANPP)/sqrt(n.plots)
  )

```

```{r "Hajek2024_ANPP.csv"}
Hajek<-read.csv("deluge/data/Hajek2024_ANPP.csv")
head(Hajek,5)

Hajek_24<-Hajek%>%
  rename(trt=Trt,plot=Plot)%>%
  mutate(Study_shorthand="Hajek2024",
         year="2024",
         C3=C3*10,
         C4=C4*10,
         FORB=Forb*10,
         ANNUALS=Annual*10,
         ANPP=Total_biomass*10)%>%
  select(Study_shorthand,plot,Rep,trt,year,C3,C4,FORB,ANNUALS,ANPP)

head(Hajek_24,5)

Hajek_24_long<-Hajek_24%>%
  pivot_longer(cols=c(C3,C4,FORB,ANNUALS,ANPP),names_to="funct_group",values_to="ANPP")%>%
  group_by(Study_shorthand,year,plot,trt,funct_group)%>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n.its=n(),
    plot.av=mean(ANPP,na.rm=TRUE),
    plot.sd=sd(ANPP,na.rm=TRUE))%>%
  rename(ANPP=plot.av)

```

```{r "Tooley_DRE_ANPP.csv"}
Tooley<-read.csv("deluge/data/Tooley_DRE_ANPP.csv")
head(Tooley,5)

# Tooley_DRE<-Tooley%>%
  # rename(year=Year,trt=WaterTreatment,legacy=Treatment,block=shelter,plot=Plot)%>%
  # mutate(Study_shorthand="Tooley_DRE",
  #        C3=C3*10,
  #        C4=C4*10,
  #        FORB=Forb*10,
  #        ANNUALS=Annual*10,
  #        ANPP=Total_biomass*10)%>%
  # select(Study_shorthand,plot,Rep,trt,year,C3,C4,FORB,ANNUALS,ANPP)

### Question for greg -- what C4 annuals did he have??? And no C3 annuals??? ###
# head(Hajek_24,5)
# 
# Hajek_24_long<-Hajek_24%>%
#   pivot_longer(cols=c(C3,C4,FORB,ANNUALS,ANPP),names_to="funct_group",values_to="ANPP")%>%
#   group_by(year,plot,trt,funct_group)%>%
#   dplyr::summarise(
#     n.its=n(),
#     plot.av=mean(ANPP,na.rm=TRUE),
#     plot.sd=sd(ANPP,na.rm=TRUE))

```

```{r "Post2020_ANPP.csv" & "Post2020_BNPP.csv"}
### ANPP ###
Post20<-read.csv("deluge/data/Post2020_ANPP.csv")
head(Post20,5)

Post2020<-Post20%>%
  rename(trt=Trt,plot=Plot)%>%
  mutate(Study_shorthand="Post2020",
         year="2020",
         GRASS=Grass_total*10,
         FORB=Forb_mass*10,
         ANPP=Total_biomass*10)%>%
  select(Study_shorthand,plot,Rep,trt,year,GRASS,FORB,ANPP)

head(Post2020)

Post2020_long<-Post2020%>%
  pivot_longer(cols=c(GRASS,FORB,ANPP),names_to="funct_group",values_to="ANPP")%>%
  group_by(Study_shorthand,year,plot,trt,funct_group)%>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n.its=n(),
    plot.av=mean(ANPP),
    plot.sd=sd(ANPP))%>%
  rename(ANPP=plot.av)
  
### BNPP ###
Post20<-read.csv("deluge/data/Post2020_BNPP.csv")
head(Post20,5)

Post2020_BNPP<-Post20%>%
  rename(trt=Trt,plot=Plot,depth=Depth)%>%
  mutate(Study_shorthand="Post2020",
         year="2020")%>%
  select(Study_shorthand,year,plot,trt,depth,BNPP)

head(Post2020_BNPP)

### merge 

```

```{r "Post2021_ANPP.csv","Post2021_BNPP.csv"}


```

```{r "Hoover2022_CPER-DEX_Productivity.csv"}
Hoover2022_CPER_DEX<-read.csv("deluge/data/Hoover2022_CPER-DEX_Productivity.csv")
head(Hoover2022_CPER_DEX,5)

Hoover2022<-Hoover2022_CPER_DEX%>%
  rename(trt=treatment,ANPP=anpp,BNPP=bnpp)%>%
  mutate(Study_shorthand="Hoover2022_CPER_DEX",
         year="2022")%>%
  select(Study_shorthand,plot,trt,year,ANPP,BNPP)

head(Hoover2022,5)

```
